page: Google Cloud Platform ct6e-standard-1t is a specialized virtual machine instance featuring 44 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 architecture. The system is equipped with 176.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance integrates a single ct6e hardware accelerator, also described as a Google V6 lite TPU, designed to accelerate machine learning workloads.

This instance type does not include any local NVMe or SSD storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached persistent disks. It also includes zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The CPU configuration features dedicated allocation, though advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512, AMX, and cryptographic hardware acceleration flags are not exposed or available on this instance profile.

The ct6e-standard-1t is engineered for machine learning workloads, specifically model inference and light training tasks that leverage the integrated Google V6 lite TPU. The 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio provides a balanced host environment for data preprocessing and pipeline management. Qualitatively, this instance offers a specialized hardware profile that balances dedicated x86_64 host compute resources with a cost-efficient, entry-level TPU accelerator, making it suitable for budget-conscious machine learning deployments that do not require high-end GPU clusters.
description: Google Cloud Platform ct6e-standard-1t is a specialized virtual machine configured with 44 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs and 176.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance features a single integrated ct6e hardware accelerator, also identified as a Google V6 lite TPU, designed to support machine learning workloads. It does not include local storage, requiring network-attached storage solutions, and provides zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. While advanced CPU instruction sets like AVX-512 and AMX are unavailable, the dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent host performance. This instance is optimized for machine learning inference, data preprocessing, and light model training, offering a cost-effective entry point into TPU-accelerated computing without the overhead of larger, multi-GPU configurations.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform ct6e-standard-1t features 44 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs, 176 GB RAM, and one Google V6 lite TPU. It is designed for cost-effective machine learning inference and data pipelines.
